items.title: Dallas’s forward depth now: Cooper Flagg, PJ Washington, Morez Johnson Jr., Zacharie Risacher, Santi Aldama, Naji Marshall, Klay Thompson, and Caleb Martin.
items.author: OrganicHunt952
items.body_excerpt: Dallas is the home of the 6ft 9 wings with big wingspans now. Their center depth is also very good, lively, Gafford, cisse. They are lacking in PG depth currently and SG depth. [Source]( https://www.espn.co.uk/nba/team/depth/\_/name/dal/dallas-mavericks )
